HOLD MUCH WHEAT AT


THE PRESENT TIME


Reports compiled by the Stats
teal bureau of the chamber show
that approximately 12,250,000
bushels of wheat was in the hands
of farmers in Washington, Oregon
and Idaho the end of March, as
against 12,249,000 bushels reported
by the government on March ri :,
and S,949,000 bushels a year ago.
OF this amount the farmers In
Washington have 100000 bushels,
with 3,450,000 in Idaho and $780,
900 in Oregon.


The report states that about i8

ington is still on the farms, against
IS per cent in farmers hands in

Oregon farmers hold less wheat

of the crop, as against 16 per cent
